name: New England Style Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and cut into 1/2 inch cubes. Chill.
2. Add celery to a bowl with 3 tbsp vinegar and salt. Mix well.
3. In another bowl, mix the sieved eggs with sour cream, remaining vinegar, pepper, mustard, garlic, and any leftover onion pieces.
4. Combine the potato mixture with the egg-sour cream dressing in a large salad bowl. Stir gently to combine.
5. Garnish with sliced olives before serving.
